title: How to report a suspected breach of sanctions
body: "Tell us if you think you, or someone else, may have breached sanctions, or be attempting to circumvent sanctions, or if you may have identified a designated person.  See how to report a suspected breach  Start now   Anyone can report a suspected breach of sanctions. Reporting breaches protects the integrity of sanctions and assists government and law enforcement agencies in tackling serious crime.  Sanctions reporting obligations  Sanctions regulations impose reporting obligations on certain types of firms – these types are listed in:      section 5 of the guidance from the Office of Financial Sanctions Implementation    section 3 of the guidance on the Trade, Aircraft and Shipping Sanctions regulations    section 9 of the guidance from the Department for Transport     If you are unsure about your obligations in a given case, you should consider taking independent legal advice. "
